changes: Closing a tab with unsaved edits to a saved request now prompts to Save, Don't Save, or Cancel instead of losing them silently
Saved requests show a green in-place Save button and an unsaved-changes hint, a collection breadcrumb, and tabs that retitle when you rename the request
Each new collection gets its own environment, and environments are now grouped by collection in the environment panel and the top-bar selector
The proxy starts disabled and clears any leftover OS proxy on launch, so a crash can never leave your machine silently proxied
Light mode redesigned with proper light panels, plus an expanded onboarding tour covering Request Scripts, the Script Workspace, and Stitch
Deleting a collection now removes the environment it created on import, while leaving your own and shared environments untouched
Re-importing a collection you already have merges into it instead of making a duplicate — content is appended and environment variables are unioned (your existing values win)
The .fetchboy export is now a complete snapshot — pre/post-response scripts, the collection-wide script, linked templates, and full named environments all round-trip
New "Include secrets" choice when exporting — keep values for a lossless round-trip, or redact them (default) to share safely
Importing a redacted export blanks secret fields for re-entry, and same-named script templates are reused instead of duplicated
Script execution output moved to a full-height "Script Output" tab in the response viewer
Collection-wide "global", pre-request, and post-response scripts now run as separate stages, each shown with its own section and dot
The global collection script is now reported correctly instead of being lumped in with the pre-request stage
New hint on the Scripts tab for unsaved requests explaining collection-wide scripts unlock once the request is saved into a collection
Fixed environment variables with an empty value being wrongly flagged as missing
Collection tree now renders true nested folders up to 5 levels deep, with depth guards on create/move/drag-drop and imports that keep their nesting
New top-level Script Workspace — a full-height editor with global, pre-request, and post-response slots, a template manager, and a run panel
FetchBoy API IntelliSense in the script editor, scoped to the stage you're editing (pre-request vs post-response)
Collection-wide "global" pre-request scripts, plus post-response/test scripts with fb.response, fb.test, and fb.expect
Importers carry Postman/Bruno test scripts across by converting pm.test/pm.expect to fb.test/fb.expect
Epic 16 code quality hardening — extracted constants, shared hooks, shared components, and module decompositions across 16 stories
Localisation infrastructure with t() helper and 14 namespace files covering all feature domains (~260 strings)
Decomposed stitchEngine.ts (885 lines) into 14 focused modules; split useSendRequest into composition hooks
Rust backend: types module decomposed, MatchType enum, 16 unwrap() calls replaced with descriptive expect()
Renamed InterceptView directory, extracted Tauri IPC wrapper hooks, 66 new tests added
Import wizard for Postman (v1, v2.0, v2.1) and Insomnia (v4) collections with environment extraction and collection-environment binding
Hardened proxy shutdown with port-release verification and "Stopping..." UI state; fixed disabled breakpoints/mappings not syncing to backend
Environment variable validation indicators on header and query param inputs; clickable quick-add for unresolved variables from the URL bar
"Open in Fetch" info banner in Request Details; collection-default environment auto-switches when loading requests
Cursor-pointer audit across intercept sidebar; reorganised collection header with Create/Import action groups
Split proxy, MainPanel, and sidebar into modular files; unified breakpoints/mappings DB layer and store CRUD patterns
Shared utilities, type safety hardening, and strict null checks across stores
Error boundaries, toast notification system, and SQLite transaction helpers
Removed legacy dual event emission from proxy handler
Virtualised debug tables and component size compliance fixes
